hero.tagline: Warrior stance, five-seat comfort and new petrol-diesel power.

overview.minides: The Harrier brings Tata's flagship SUV design, 5-seat practicality, 5-star safety and a broad 50-variant petrol-diesel lineup.
overview.description: The Tata Harrier facelift is a 5-seat mid-size SUV built on the OMEGARC architecture. The 2026 range adds 1.5L Hyperion turbo-petrol choices alongside the 2.0L Kryotec diesel, with manual and automatic gearboxes, 6 main trims and 50 variants including Dark, Ultra and Ultra Red Dark editions.

suspension.front: Independent - MacPherson Strut with Anti-Roll Bar
suspension.rear: Semi-Independent - Twist Blade with Anti-Roll Bar
